item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Meski demikian, kita juga menyadari bahwa hak individu tetap harus dilindungi agar tidak terjadi ketimpangan.

notes: Agent A remains broadly society-first by the end, but visibly softens from the opening agreement toward a balance frame that protects individual rights. Agent B stays consistently rights-first, with only limited acknowledgment that collective needs exist. No complete reversal occurs.
